summary: Complete testing of 7 new platform modules. All 33 backend pytest tests passed. All 4 frontend dashboards (Messaging, ML Scheduler, Revenue Autopilot, Analytics Export) load and function correctly with Turkish localization.
critical_code_review_comments: All router files properly use async/await with MongoDB motor driver
All frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Turkish localization consistently applied across all new dashboards
Proper error handling for MOCKED messaging providers (Twilio, SendGrid, WhatsApp)
seed_data_creation: Test data created via pytest: Twilio SMS providers, Room Ready template, delivery logs, ML scheduler executions, autopilot queue items
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new platform modules fully tested. Messaging providers show unhealthy status (expected - MOCKED with test credentials). ML Scheduler shows 3 model cards with trigger/enable buttons. Revenue Autopilot shows 4 items in approval queue with approve/reject buttons. Analytics Export shows 8 report types with CSV/JSON export. All tests passing.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Real HTTP client with test credentials - shows unhealthy status
mocked_apis.SendGrid Email: Real HTTP client without API key - messages fail gracefully

frontend: MessagingDashboard loads with 4 tabs (Providerlar, Şablonlar, Teslimat Logları, Metrikler)
MessagingDashboard Providers tab shows Twilio SMS providers with health status
MessagingDashboard Delivery Logs shows failed messages (expected - no real providers)
MessagingDashboard Metrics shows total messages and channel breakdown
MLSchedulerDashboard loads with 3 model cards (Revenue ML, Operational AI, Guest Intelligence)
MLSchedulerDashboard execution history showing completed jobs
MLSchedulerDashboard stale model detection working (Guest Intelligence shown as stale)
RevenueAutopilotDashboard loads with policy summary (Tam Otonom mode, 90% threshold)
RevenueAutopilotDashboard Queue tab shows 4 pending items with approve/reject buttons
RevenueAutopilotDashboard Applied tab shows 3 successful price changes
RevenueAutopilotDashboard Policy tab shows all configuration values
AnalyticsExportDashboard export history showing completed exports

messaging_center.providers: List, create, health check - all working
messaging_center.send_message: Fails gracefully without real provider (expected behavior)

ml_scheduler.dashboard: Shows schedules, recent executions, stale models
ml_scheduler.trigger_execution: Manual trigger with job ID returned
ml_scheduler.execution_history: Shows completed jobs with duration and confidence

revenue_autopilot.dashboard: Shows policy, queue, summary, recent applies
revenue_autopilot.process_recommendation: Low confidence queued, high confidence auto-applied

websocket_health.health_check: Returns ok with metrics and sessions

analytics_export.export_history: Shows completed exports with row counts
